transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you for calling First National Bank. My name is Sophie. For security, could I take your full name and date of birth?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Of course. It's Carlos Vega, twenty-ninth of January 1985.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you Mr. Vega, all verified. What's the nature of your call today?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: I noticed a charge on my account this morning — sixty-two pounds — from a company called TechSubs Ltd. I've never heard of them and I definitely didn't authorise this.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: That must be very alarming. Let me pull up the transaction. I can see the charge, processed yesterday at 11:43 PM. Can I confirm — you've never dealt with TechSubs Ltd in any capacity? No subscriptions, trial memberships?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Absolutely not. I've never heard of the name.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: In that case I'll raise a formal dispute immediately and place a temporary hold on your card as a precaution while we investigate — is that okay?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Yes please, I'd rather be safe.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Done. Your case reference is DISP-2024-8831. The investigation takes three to five working days. We'll refund the amount provisionally within two working days while we investigate. You'll receive a confirmation email within the hour.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: That's exactly what I needed. Thank you for being so efficient.
